_note: Experimental site-level Model Context Protocol manifest. Schema is a community draft (see https://modelcontextprotocol.io). This site is a static, public, read-only documentation surface — listed resources are GET-only.
name: M3-CRETE
description: Open-source concrete 3D printer hardware. Static documentation site with machine-readable Bill of Materials.

resources.name: GetBOM
resources.description: Bill of Materials as JSON. Source of truth for parts, quantities, and supplier coverage. ~66 parts, ~216 supplier options across ~37 suppliers.

resources.name: GetPrinterSpecs
resources.description: Site index page with embedded Product JSON-LD (build volume, models, license, brand). Parse the application/ld+json script tag for structured data.

resources.name: ListVariants
resources.description: Model variants and their parameter overrides (M3-1, M3-2, M3-4) as a JavaScript module. The MODEL_VARIANTS export contains build volume and quantity overrides.

related.cemforge.ai: AI mix-formulation platform — generate printable concrete formulations to run on M3-CRETE
related.open3dcp.org: Open3DCP — printability dataset and schema covering this hardware class
